user.title: Add Solar of Things Station
user.description:
Configure your Solar of Things station. You can add multiple stations by configuring this integration multiple times.

To find your credentials:
1. Log into https://solar.siseli.com
2. Open browser developer tools (F12) → Network tab
3. Refresh the page and look at API requests
4. Copy the IOT-Token from request headers
5. Find stationId and deviceId in the request URLs or payloads

More info: {docs_url}

data.device_id: Device ID (optional; leave blank to auto-discover all devices)

add_another.title: Add Another Station?
add_another.description: You have added {station_count} station(s). Would you like to add another?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Solar of Things API. Please check your IOT Token and IDs.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.
